positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a celestial forest: ancient, stylized trees with branches that intertwine like constellations. Floating geometric moons and stylized nebulas drift through the branches. The overall composition should be symmetrical and contained within a circular space, providing negative space for text if needed. Style should be a blend of Art Deco and scientific illustration, rendered in deep indigo, gold foil accents, and creamy off-white. High contrast silhouette, perfect for a single-color screen print or DTG print on apparel. Centered, elegant composition, vector style, flat graphic design.
